properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v7 v8 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The beauty of your majesty And displayed for all the world to see Is it any wonder? Is it any wonder?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The glory of Your holiness The mercy of Your faithfulness Is it any wonder? Is it any wonder?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We sing great are You, Lord, for we adore You Lift up Your name and fall before You We stand in awe and say great are You, Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You lift up our voice, we say holy, holy Hallelujah, to the one and only Forever more, we'll say great are You, Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Through endless ages You will reign Yet, every season You're the same Is it any wonder? Is it any wonder?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The power of Your redeeming plan Grace that offers life to man Is it any wonder? Is it any wonder?

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Is it any wonder, any wonder we sing Any wonder we sing, oh

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Is it any wonder we sing (Great are You, Lord) Is it any wonder we sing (Great are You, Lord) Is it any wonder?

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Great are You, Lord (Is it any wonder?) Great are You, Lord (Is it any wonder?) Great are You, Lord We sing great are You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Great are You, Lord (Is it any wonder?) Great are You, Lord (Is it any wonder?) Great are You, Lord We say great are You, Lord

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Say great are You, Lord, Say great are You, Lord, Say great are You, Lord.
